x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA knowledge integration enables Now Assist to surface relevant KB articles within conversations. Without KB integration, Now Assist cannot provide article-based self-service answers.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure and activate VA auto-resolution via sys_cs_auto_resolution_configuration. Ensure at least 100 published KB articles exist for deflection coverage. Now Assist VA surfaces KB articles as AI-recommended answers in conversations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c53
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[VA knowledge integration enables Now Assist to surface relevant KB articles within conversations. Without KB integration, Now Assist cannot provide article-based self-service answers.]]></ai_justification><check_name>VA Knowledge Integration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check 1: Auto-resolution configuration (OOB VA-KB deflection mechanism on modern instances)
    var gaAutoRes = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_auto_resolution_configuration');
    gaAutoRes.addQuery('active', true);
    gaAutoRes.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaAutoRes.query();
    var activeAutoRes = gaAutoRes.next() ? parseInt(gaAutoRes.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    // Check 2: Published KB articles (content behind the deflection)
    var gaKB = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaKB.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaKB.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaKB.query();
    var articles = gaKB.next() ? parseInt(gaKB.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = 'Auto-resolution configs active: ' + activeAutoRes + ' | Published KB articles: ' + articles;

    if (activeAutoRes >= 1 && articles >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA auto-resolution is active with ' + articles + ' published KB articles. Now Assist VA can surface AI-recommended KB articles for self-service deflection.'
        };
    } else if (activeAutoRes >= 1 && articles >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA auto-resolution is active but only ' + articles + ' published KB articles exist (target: 100+). Now Assist VA KB deflection coverage will be limited.'
        };
    } else if (activeAutoRes === 0 && articles >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Sufficient KB content exists (' + articles + ' published articles) but VA auto-resolution is not active. Now Assist VA cannot surface KB articles for deflection without an active auto-resolution configuration.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA auto-resolution is ' + (activeAutoRes >= 1 ? 'active' : 'not active') + ' with only ' + articles + ' published KB articles. Now Assist VA cannot provide meaningful KB-based self-service deflection without both an active auto-resolution configuration and sufficient KB content.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module><number>CHK0000510</number><order>100</order><remediation_guidance>Configure and activate VA auto-resolution via sys_cs_auto_resolution_configuration. Ensure at least 100 published KB articles exist for deflection coverage. Now Assist VA surfaces KB articles as AI-recommended answers in conversations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>cff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c53</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>VA Knowledge Integration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c53</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
